name: chain_ph_launch_musiclib_the_ultimate_sheet
method: [PH LAUNCH] MusicLib: The Ultimate Sheet Music Library Solution

stages.task: Scrape PH top 20 daily launches — extract product name, category, founder name, Twitter/LinkedIn handle, website URL, upvote count, and tagline
Filter for B2B tools, prosumer apps, and solo-founder projects scoring 7+ on lead quality (small team, fresh launch, growth-stage signals in tagline). Exclude enterprise/VC-backed.

Find founder email via website contact page or Hunter.io free tier. Generate personalized cold email referencing their specific launch: product name, pain point from tagline, one concrete growth lever we can deliver. Log to outreach pipeline with 48h follow-up flag.
